global_description: A small, slender bird with an iridescent green back and crown, a striking ruby-red throat, and a white underbelly. It has a long, thin, black bill and rapid, blurred wings. The tail is forked and dark with white tips.
discriminative_attributes: Forked dark tail with white tips

part_details.throat: Vivid ruby-red, iridescent patch on the throat.
part_details.back: Shimmering green, smooth feathers covering the back.
part_details.bill: Long, thin, and black, slightly curved.
part_details.wings: Small, rapid, appearing blurred in motion.
part_details.tail: Forked, dark with white tips, short and fan-shaped.

spatial_relations: The long bill extends from the small head.
The iridescent green back covers the upper body.
The ruby-red throat is below the head.
The forked tail extends from the rear.
